channel.title: Topology on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Topology on emsenn.net

item.title: Directed Space compiler
item.description:
Directed Space Compiler Architecture

Generates the directed spaces, flows, and stratified sites consumed by runtime, analytics, and reasoning modules.

Dependencies

  • Directed Homotopy Simulation: supplies flow/nucleus mechanics and tower coherence checks for oriented paths.
  • Directed Stratified Site Simulation: provides strata definitions, coverage, and tower templates for each module family.
  • Topology Integration Simulation: consumes compiled artifacts; this service validates that emitted bundles satisfy the integration rules.
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: exports compiler diagnostics (coherence checks, coverage errors) for monitoring/policy use.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: records which acts/specs justify each published topology bundle.

Components

  1. Strata Registry.
    Materializes the strata catalog with their discipline/filter settings and exposes APIs to register new module strata.

item.title: Topology integration Service
item.description:
Topology Integration Service Architecture

Bridges directed profile towers and sheaf semantics into operational plans so runtime, storage, and orchestration components respect the earned topology.

Dependencies

  • Topology Integration Simulation: constraint synthesis and validation.
  • Directed Homotopy / Directed Stratified Site specs: provide strata and flow/nucleus data.
  • Infinity-Site / Sheaf Topos specs: supply cover and gluing information for locality decisions.
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: publishes constraint compilation metrics and violations.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: records which acts/specs justify every constraint bundle.

Components

  1. Artifact Ingest.
    Pulls the latest directed site/sheaf bundles from the compiler/assembly services, normalizes them, and tracks version lineage.
